Week 4 is live: Week 4 Draw Update

Draw update for 20-26 April 2026 . Week 4 stays centered on the Madrid ATP Masters 1000 , with the official event window live from 22 April - 3 May, 2026 . Now that the bracket is in focus, the fantasy edge shifts to quarter balance, path quality, Bonus Ball leverage, and which power-based clay profiles can actually convert this draw into wins.

Bonus Ball board: Carlos Alcaraz, Jannik Sinner, Alexander Zverev.
